# coolify_version (Data Source)

Retrieves the version of the connected Coolify instance.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "coolify_version" "current" {}

output "coolify_version" {
  value = data.coolify_version.current.version
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `version` (String) The Coolify instance version string.
